results.justification: EXACT TWIN — Graph-isomorphism property integrated into attention for structurally-equivalent motif consistency IS the graph-minor canonical-motif catalog mechanism.
Attention graphs aggregated across layers/heads for mechanistic motif analysis IS the per-head attention-graph motif detection paradigm.
EXACT TWIN — Topological divergence on attention-map-induced graphs IS the graph-minor isomorphism defect detection mechanism applied to attention.
T3former topological + spectral descriptors via cross-attention covers graph-topology in attention paradigm.
Topological features in graph transformer for isomorphism discrimination covers graph-minor + transformer attention combined.
EXACT TWIN — Per-head defect identification + per-head repair projection IS the per-row defect detection + permutation re-route repair mechanism in IDRIJA-LACE-DEFECT.
Attention heads recognize canonical TATAAA motif IS the canonical-motif-template detection paradigm via attention head specialization.
Attention head intervention for interpretability covers per-head defect identification + intervention patch (repair) paradigm.
